Furry Mancrushes.prompt: A heel tiger that's on fire.
He's a turtle dad and he's very bad.
He's an accountant who only needs one eye to swing around a concrete pillar.
An Australian Archaeologist with an equal number of brothers and daughters.
A blue-nosed twitch streamer who is banned in at least 4 countries.

Con Drama.response: What is Biggest Little Fur Con?
Con Drama.prompt: Attendees displayed an unauthorized pizza topping at this convention.
This "convention" was attended by a fursuiter with the world's worst bowl cut.
A next-gen portrait shot on an iPhone 15 pro haunted this convention.
You can make anyone who bothers you disappear at this convention.
A non-furry convention attended by a lot of furries that is widely misunderstood.

Information Technology.prompt: Probably the thing people lie about doing the most.
Just a password alone isn't enough when using this to log in.
You can use them to catch a fish and infect a computer with contagious malware.
Even if you can't drive, you can work at one to respond to a ton of tickets.

Fictional Species.prompt: A race of robotic anthropomorphic cyborgs have LCD screens for faces.
A small canine loaf creature with a tadpole tail.
A latex creature that floats on water.
A shark-headed mammal with kangaroo feet.
These winged reptilian creatures are known to hoard valuable items.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.prompt: These o(h)-so large animals take very long naps.
Though this species has "red" in the name, many fursonas of this species are not red at all.
This apple-eating species has plenty of leg to stand on.
A species that shares a name with a line of boots made by someone with a graduate degree.
This Mexican creature can regrow its own pink severed limbs.

Lexicon and Lingo.prompt: An anthropomorphic animal character that represents someone personally.
A furry that can order off of the senior menu.
A profound sadness experienced after a convention.
